root.rep_text: รายงานรายการวัสดุของสหกรณ์ที่ตัดจ่าย
root.sql: SELECT DISTINCT sc_acc_m_expire_detail.meterial_id, sc_acc_m_expire.description, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.seq_no, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.amount, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.total_amount, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.present_value, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.cal_expire_date, sc_acc_m_expire.rate_expire, sc_acc_m_expire.amount_value, sc_acc_m_expire.entry_id, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.operate_date, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.item_type, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.acc_exp, sc_acc_m_expire_detail.day_cal, sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old FROM sc_acc_m_expire, sc_acc_m_expire_detail WHERE ( sc_acc_m_expire_detail.meterial_id = sc_acc_m_expire.material_id ) /* and ( ( sc_acc_m_expire_detail.operate_date between :adtm_begindate and :adtm_enddate )*/ and (sc_acc_m_expire.cut_paid_status = 2 OR sc_acc_m_expire.cut_paid_status = 3) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old
